message:
feat(cli): implement transform command

Add `lanceql transform` command that applies SQL-like transformations
to any supported file format and outputs to Lance format.

Features:
- --select "col1,col2" for column projection
- --filter "x > 100" for row filtering
- --rename "old:new" for column renaming (with --select)
- --limit N for row limiting
- Auto-detects input format (Parquet, Lance, Arrow, Avro, ORC, XLSX)

Implementation:
- Builds SQL query from CLI options
- Executes using existing SQL executor
- Writes results to Lance using LanceWriter

Example:
  lanceql transform data.parquet -o out.lance --select "id,name" --filter "id > 10"
